nasb.text: Then the border turned westward to Aznoth-tabor and proceeded from there to Hukkok; and it reached to Zebulun on the south and touched Asher on the west, and to Judah at the Jordan toward the east.

esv.text: Then the boundary turns westward to Aznoth-tabor and goes from there to Hukkok, touching Zebulun at the south and Asher on the west and Judah on the east at the Jordan.

cnv.text: 又向西轉到亞斯納．他泊，從那裡伸展到戶割，南邊達到西布倫，西邊達到亞設，東邊達到約旦河那裡的猶大。

ccb.text: 又向西到亚斯纳·他泊、户割，南接西布伦，西接亚设，东接约旦河。
